docs.text:

This site is a portfolio showcasing my work, writing samples, and resume.

docs.title: API Documentation Samples
docs.text:
This section contains samples of API documentation I've written.

  • Sample API

docs.title: Sample API
docs.text: Full example: api-docs/sample-api.md

docs.title: TaskFlow API Reference  Base URL: https://api.taskflow.io/v1 Authentication: Bearer token in Authorization header  ---
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description title string Yes Task title (max 255 characters) due_date string No ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD) priority string No low, medium, or high. Default: medium assignee_id integer No User ID of the assignee

docs.title: Example request
docs.text:
curl -X POST https://api.taskflow.io/v1/tasks \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "title": "Write onboarding guide",
    "due_date": "2025-06-30",
    "priority": "high",
    "assignee_id": 42
  }'

docs.title: Example response (201 Created)
docs.text:
{
  "id": 1024,
  "title": "Write onboarding guide",
  "due_date": "2025-06-30",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "open",
  "assignee_id": 42,
  "created_at": "2025-05-31T10:22:00Z"
}

docs.title: Error responses
docs.text: Status Code Description 400 invalid_field A required field is missing or malformed 401 unauthorized Token is missing or expired 422 validation_error Due date is in the past

docs.title: Getting started with TaskFlow
docs.text: This guide walks you through creating your first task in TaskFlow in under 5 minutes.

docs.title: Before you begin  You need:
docs.text:
• A TaskFlow account (sign up free at taskflow.io)
  • A modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, or Safari)

  • ## Step 1: Log in and open your workspace

  • Go to app.taskflow.io and sign in with your email and password.

  • On the dashboard, click My Workspace in the left sidebar. Your workspace is your personal task board. Team workspaces appear below it if your account is part of an organization.

docs.title: Step 2: Create your first task
docs.text:
1. Click the + New task button in the top-right corner of your workspace.
  2. In the Title field, type a name for your task. For example: Write product overview draft.
  3. (Optional) Set a Due date by clicking the calendar icon and selecting a date.
  4. (Optional) Set a Priority: Low, Medium, or High. Tasks default to Medium.
  5. Click Create task. Your task appears in the Open column of your workspace.

docs.title: Step 3: Assign and organize your task  If you're working in a team workspace:
docs.text:
1. Click on the task to open its detail panel.
  2. Under Assignee, click Unassigned and select a team member from the list.
  3. Under Label, click + Add label and choose a category such as Documentation or Design. Labels help you filter and report on tasks later.

docs.title: What's next?
docs.text:
• Learn how to create recurring tasks: Recurring tasks
  • Invite your team to a shared workspace: Team workspaces
  • Connect TaskFlow to Slack: Integrations
